chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-4321 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 16.10.2025 None present for the petitioner --------- On the last date of hearing i.e. 06.09.2024 which was over one year ago, learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court on the point of maintainability of this petition. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Once-again, today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
